<> $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $string = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $string); echo $string; This code replaces the URL "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1" with "http://yahoo.com/abc1" in the string. The replacement works for any occurrence of the URL in the string. Here is a palindrome in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
